welcome.first_time:
🎉 Welcome to AYZEN, {name}!

You need to register on our site:
🔗 ayzen.tech/register

Then send here: /link {code}
welcome.not_linked:
⚠️ Your account is not linked yet.

First register:
🔗 ayzen.tech/register

Then send here: /link {code}
welcome.link_success:
✅ Your account has been successfully linked!

Go to /menu to select a project.
welcome.already_linked: ⚠️ This Telegram account is already linked.
welcome.link_invalid: ❌ Invalid or expired link code. Go to ayzen.tech/settings for a new code.
welcome.unlinked: ✅ Your account has been unlinked. Send /start to return.
settings_menu.quiet_hours_header:
🔕 *Quiet Hours*

Select a window when notifications are silenced:
settings_menu.unlink_confirm: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to unlink your Telegram account?
task.empty: ⏳ No tasks assigned to you in this project.
task.deadline_passed: ⏰ The deadline for this task has passed.
submit.choose_slot:
🔗 Which account to submit with?

Your available slots:
submit.duplicate: ⚠️ You have already submitted with this account.
submit.all_done:
✅ All submissions successful\! 🎉

💰 Total *{points} points* earned\!
submit.batch_header:
☑ *Batch Submit*

Select which accounts to submit with:
submit.max_slots: ⚠️ You can submit a maximum of {max} slots.
slot.setup_header:
🔗 *Account Slot Setup*

Enter your account details. Each slot is one airdrop account.
slot.ask_twitter: 🐦 Enter your Twitter/X username (with or without @):
slot.no_slots: ⚠️ You have no account slots. Use /setup to configure.
project.empty:
⚠️ You are not assigned to any projects.

Contact your admin.
project.not_member: ❌ You are not a member of this project.
progress.csv_ready: 📥 Your progress CSV is ready\! Downloading...
status.streak: 🔥 *{streak} days* streak going\! Keep it up\!
help.main:
❓ *AYZEN Help*

AYZEN is an airdrop task management bot.

You can complete your assigned tasks here.
help.commands:
📋 *Commands:*
/start — Get started
/menu — View menu
/status — Today's summary
/help — Help
/settings — Settings
/cancel — Cancel
help.contact_admin: For questions, contact your project admin.
admin.no_permission: ❌ You do not have permission to do this.
error.unauthorized: ❌ You do not have permission to do this.
error.rate_limit: ⏳ Slow down! Try again in a moment.
error.maintenance: 🔧 Bot is temporarily in maintenance mode. /start, /help and /status still work.
error.unknown: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
error.session_expired: ⏰ Session expired. Use /menu to start again.
error.not_linked: ❌ Your account is not linked. Send /start.
error.no_project: 📭 No active project selected. Use /menu to select one.
error.generic: ❌ Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.permission_denied: 🚫 You do not have permission for this action.
achievements.share_text: I just earned the {badge_name} badge on AYZEN! 🏅
onboarding.complete: 🎊 Onboarding complete! Thanks for using AYZEN.
referral.your_link:
Share this link to invite members:
`{link}`
referral.used: ✅ Referral link applied! You joined via {referrer_name}.
referral.self: ⚠️ You cannot use your own referral link.
deeplink.join_success:
✅ You have joined *{project_name}*!

Use /menu to see your tasks.
deeplink.already_member: ⚠️ You are already a member of this project.
deeplink.project_full: ❌ This project has reached its member limit.
pin.limit: ⚠️ You can pin a maximum of {max} tasks.
pin.empty: 📭 No pinned tasks. Open a task and tap 📌 to pin it.
search.header:
🔍 *Search Tasks*

Type a keyword to search:
search.too_short: ⚠️ Search query must be at least 2 characters.
export.ready:
📥 *Export Ready*

Your {type} export is ready\. Tap to download\.
export.no_data: 📭 No data to export for this period.
owner_transfer.prompt:
👑 *Transfer Ownership*

Are you sure you want to transfer ownership of *{project_name}* to *{new_owner}*?

This action cannot be undone.
owner_transfer.confirm_code: 🔐 Type the project name to confirm: `{project_name}`
owner_transfer.invalid_confirm: ❌ Project name did not match. Transfer cancelled.
owner_transfer.not_owner: ❌ Only the project owner can transfer ownership.
owner_transfer.select_candidate: 👑 Select the member to transfer ownership to:
owner_transfer.no_candidates: ⚠️ No eligible managers found. Promote a member to Manager first.
reward.streak_reward:
🔥 *{days}-Day Streak!*

You've been on a roll\! +{bonus_points} bonus points awarded\.
reward.top_earner:
🥇 *Top Earner This Week\!*

Congratulations, {name}\! You ranked #1 with {points} points\.
maintenance.on:
🔧 *Maintenance Mode ON*

Bot is in maintenance. Only basic commands work.
maintenance.off: ✅ Maintenance mode disabled. Bot is fully operational.
